comment: Loved checking in daily to see previous years memories of the day and sharing them with family. Now having updated the feature is a bloated mess showing random unconnected days through the year. "Revisit this moment, Featured Friday, Remember this day".... Etc. All designed to keep me using the app for longer, but in reality actually turned me off using the feature altogether. It's an unnecessary addition. Going to try revert to an older version, if not I'll just give up.
key sentence: key words: previous years memories, updated feature, random unconnected days, unnecessary addition
the function of activity: This activity allows users to navigate to library/memories/search, cast content, back up photos, favorite items, and access various editing and sharing options.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Share', 'description': 'Share content'}, {'name': 'Settings', 'description': 'Access account and app settings'}, {'name': 'Creations', 'description': 'Create new content'}, {'name': 'Sharing', 'description': 'Share content with others'}, {'name': 'View Memories', 'description': 'View photos of memories.'}, {'name': 'Memories', 'description': 'Access memories'}, {'name': 'Add Memory', 'description': 'Add a new memory.'}]
